message:
test(conformance): add math, stdio, stdlib, inet, poll, setjmp conformance harnesses

Adds fixture validation tests for:
- math_ops: sin, cos, exp, log, pow, floor, ceil (14 tests)
- stdio_file_ops: fopen, fclose, fread, fwrite, fseek (16 tests)
- stdlib_conversion: atoi, strtol, base handling, overflow (11 tests)
- inet_ops: htons, htonl, inet_addr, inet_pton/ntop (15 tests)
- poll_ops: poll, select, invalid fd handling (10 tests)
- setjmp_ops: setjmp, longjmp, corruption detection (11 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
